name: hugegraph-ai-deepwiki-skill
description: DeepWiki-backed Q&A skill for Apache HugeGraph AI.

interface.shortDescription: Ask DeepWiki about Apache HugeGraph AI.
interface.longDescription: Provides a repository-grounded Apache HugeGraph AI Q&A skill that forwards installation, examples, agents, RAG workflows, graph-enhanced AI, model integration, configuration, and implementation questions to the official DeepWiki MCP wiki.
defaultPrompt: Use $hugegraph-ai-deepwiki-skill to answer my HugeGraph AI question.
